12 - Quit Selling Time And Start Selling Value.mp4
Quit selling time and start selling value. What's that mean? Well, let's go over it. If you're currently doing that whole, I don't even know what minimum wage is where you are, but in Miami, it was $7. 50 an hour. I think they're doing that whole $15 minimum wage thing now. I honestly don't even know because I haven't even come close to minimum wage for a very long time. And I hope you aren't either. But even if you're in the consideration of getting paid, an hour than maybe you are. Maybe you're like some of the people that I used to experience in Ohio that at a young age would tell me, 'Oh, I'm getting paid $13 an hour now.' That's really good money. No, it's not.
Horrendous and you need to grow your perspective on the amount of money that's being made. Did you know that billions of dollars, literally billions of dollars in e-commerce are transacted every single ongoing week and month on the internet? Did you know that Amazon. com makes $3 million? $3 million in a minute. Did you know that Google has 49 years worth of work in one day because they have 54,000 employees who work 469,000 hours in a day, which is that 49 years that they get done in one day when you barely work eight hours and you're only getting paid for your time. Very wrong. Very, very incorrect perspective. All from conditioning of this multi-trillion-dollar industry called school. That makes you, all the people around you, all those, and I apologize if you went to school.
I'm going to completely call you out here. You fell into a trap where a bunch of people are paid for time. Whoo! Boy, oh boy, did they get you good. People are paid for time. They don't even conceive how to sell something for value. They don't even know what value is. They buy things that are valuable all the time. They're constantly consuming things that are valuable all the time. They're constantly looking for these things that are valuable. Did you know that people who typically sell their time are the people who... submit the most customer complaints? Did you know that people who typically sell their time are the ones who are late the most and understand time the least? Did you know that people who sell their time are typically the ones who get the least done in their life?
Because they're the ones who are selling the very asset that is worth more than money by such an exuberant nominal degree that it's not even quantifiable in comparison. The graph, for example, if you were selling your time, this would be dirt. Absolute dirt for the money you're going to get in exchange for what your time is worth. You have an enormous amount of money in your time when you keep it. Keep your time. Keep it. Keep it. Do not give it away. Do not trade your time for dirt revenue. Minimum wage. Fifteen dollars you could get paid up to I don't know, maybe a hundred dollars an hour and that's still very very low revenue, comparatively to the amount of money that you could be making because you could be making $50 an hour here, $50 an hour there, $50 an hour here.
All of a sudden, you understand the power of internet money. You understand the power of helping online businesses. You understand the power of building one yourself. Already have one, or you're doing all of these investments, you understand the Warren Buffett quote, that it's all about capital gains and not income. And more importantly, you understand on a fundamental level that when you sell your time, you lose the time. Time to build businesses. You lose the time that's going to build an opportunity, an ability to execute on your dream. Your goals, what's required of you, listen. If you have a job right now, I'm not telling you to just quit and jump out of what you currently do. It's not what I'm describing, but I need you to understand.
If you're selling time, you're losing so much because value is sold in the market every day for extremely high price points. Did you know that? On average, the digital agency owners you don't know— these are people who are helping businesses, any business, up to 95% of businesses in the entire world right now— are in horrendous conditions on the internet, meaning their websites are bad. Even if they have a marketing team, they don't have Facebook pixels installed. They don't have Google tag managers installed. Their website's funnel is broken. They don't have a funnel there. Marketing automation doesn't exist. Their Facebook is getting four likes per post. They don't even have a Facebook. They don't have this, that. Their Google is trash. There are so many people right now who you could go out and on average, like I said, I've...
helped people, thousands of people grow to the point where they can drive revenue for themselves, a consistent revenue with that and building. real sellable business called a digital agency who are banking 10K per deal. They're going from getting paid hourly to getting paid tens of thousands of dollars. For the same hours, all from the perspective of selling value instead of selling time, right? Selling time disables you from even seeing value because you're getting taken advantage of yourself. So if you're allowing yourself to get taken advantage of, what value can you see? There's no convincing yourself otherwise. There's literally not. If you can't see that every single opportunity is right in front of your very eyes, you just can't see it yet. You can only see what you look for.

Brown. Document it down.
Brown, brown. What's brown? What's brown? Okay. Now stop. Come back to me. Look. Hey, okay, so. You looked for everything that was brown. Now, without looking, do not cheat. What around you was the color green? Don't look! What was the color green? Think about it. What was green? What was green around you? Really try to look, but without looking. Now, go ahead and check it out. What was green? What was green all around you? Figure it out. Identify it. What was green? What was green? Identify every single thing around you that was green. It's like when you get a new car and all of a sudden you see your new car all over the place. You're like, 'What the hell?' Did everybody go out and buy this? car that I just bought? No, you are seeing what you couldn't see before, because you can only see what you choose to see, but you have to choose to see it. Do you see how easy that is to direct your attention and miss what it is that we're not looking for? Can you imagine that if you're not looking for the value that you could sell others on? Of how advantageous it'd be for somebody else to come in and absolutely take advantage of you and buy your time, because you don't see what they see within you and your ability to produce, right?
They see the value of you as a person and what you can deliver for them, yet you just see the fact that you're selling your time for a dollar figure. You have to know everybody around you. Every single thing that's going on around you has an opportunity to be improved in an online way. You have the ability yourself. From all these different ways that you can make money online, there's crypto, coin, drop shipping, building digital agencies, which give you an opportunity to sell a business rather than just do the things kind of make you a little income. Right? You have to know that every single thing you don't want just outsource. Right? You want to start with outsourcing, but you want to build a business. That comes with seeing value instead of selling your time.
You have to transition this. And if you already transition this, see more value in yourself. Don't ever project onto value. Don't ever say to yourself, 'I wouldn't spend $50,000 on that watch.' Nobody would. That's impossible. And then watch the guy walk up right after you and... bank out $50,000 because he had $50,000 cash in his pocket, coincidentally. That was chump change to him. Yet to you, it was inconceivable. If you were the salesperson selling somebody that watch, and you would... say, oh, well, I don't think you'd buy this one because it's $50,000. Hey, maybe they won't because you projected onto them exactly what you wanted the situation to be, right? Change your perspective, change your life, quit selling time, start selling value, drive your levels up, ladies and gentlemen. See you in the next video.
